descriptions.text:
From the Moemon series, where all Pokémon have been replaced by cute anime-style girls (Moe = cute in Japanese).
You and your Moemon Latios have been given a hellish curse by a Moemon goddess. In order to free yourself from this curse, you must fulfill all her wishes. She told you, you must go on a poaching journey and stop the chosen one at all costs. However, you must also persuade and ease the hearts of the many MOEMONS you encounter.
Walk the path of white shadows. Form bonds with your fellow MOEMON, unravel mysteries and secrets in this modernized MOEMON world. Become the rival, and follow the clues of the chosen one.
